name: kneat.com, inc.
summary: kneat.com, inc. designs, develops, and supplies software for data and document management within regulated environments in the United States, Ireland, Canada, internationally. The company offers Kneat Gx platform, a configurable commercial off-the-shelf application focused on validation lifecycle management and testing for biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and medical device manufacturing industries. Its platform is used in instrument, method, utility and facility, process, equipment, computer system, cold chain, and cleaning validation, as well commissioning and qualification, and electronic logbook management. It also provides software-related services, including training, installation, upgradation, consulting, and maintenance, as well as process mapping, project management, and other services. The company is headquartered in Limerick, Ireland.
